function createElection(string title, uint64 startTime, uint64 endTime) returns (uint256)
function castVote(uint256 electionId, bytes32 voterHash, bytes32 commitment)
function revealVote(uint256 electionId, bytes32 voterHash, uint256 candidateId, bytes32 nonce)
function getHasVoted(uint256 electionId, bytes32 voterHash) view returns (bool)
function getHasRevealed(uint256 electionId, bytes32 voterHash) view returns (bool)
function getVoteCommitment(uint256 electionId, bytes32 voterHash) view returns (bytes32)
function getParticipationStats(uint256 electionId) view returns (uint256 committed, uint256 revealed)
function getResults(uint256 electionId) view returns (uint256[] candidateIds, uint256[] counts, string[] names)
function elections(uint256 electionId) view returns (uint256 id, string title, uint8 state, uint64 startTime, uint64 endTime, uint256 candidateCount, uint256 votesCommitted, uint256 votesRevealed)
event VoteCommitted(uint256 indexed electionId, bytes32 indexed voterHash, bytes32 commitment, uint256 timestamp)
event VoteRevealed(uint256 indexed electionId, bytes32 indexed voterHash, uint256 candidateId)
